from src.topstep_client import TopstepClient
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
with TopstepClient\(\) as c:
    end = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
    start = end - timedelta\(minutes=30\)
    bars = c.get_bars\('CON.F.US.MES.H26', start, end, unit=TopstepClient.MINUTE, unit_number=1, limit=31\)
    print\(f'bars returned: {len\(bars\)}'\)
    if bars:
        print\(bars[-1]\)
" 2>&1)

from src.topstep_client import TopstepClient
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
with TopstepClient\(\) as c:
    end = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
    start = end - timedelta\(hours=4\)
    bars = c.get_bars\('CON.F.US.MES.H26', start, end, unit=TopstepClient.MINUTE, unit_number=5, limit=100\)
    print\(f'5-min bars: {len\(bars\)}'\)
    bars2 = c.get_bars\('CON.F.US.MES.H26', start, end, unit=TopstepClient.MINUTE, unit_number=1, limit=500\)
    print\(f'1-min bars: {len\(bars2\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(/usr/local/bin/python3 -c "
from src.topstep_client import TopstepClient
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
with TopstepClient\(\) as c:
    end = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
    start = end - timedelta\(hours=4\)
    bars = c.get_bars\('CON.F.US.MES.H26', start, end, unit=TopstepClient.MINUTE, unit_number=1, limit=500\)
    print\(f'now:       {end.isoformat\(\)}'\)
    print\(f'last bar:  {bars[-1][\\"t\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'first bar: {bars[0][\\"t\\"]}'\)
    delta = end - datetime.fromisoformat\(bars[-1]['t']\)
    print\(f'lag:       {delta}'\)
" 2>&1)

df = pd.read_excel\('/Users/marek/mf-trade-bot/polygon_data_QQQ.xlsx'\)

print\('columns:', df.columns.tolist\(\)\)
